body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Daimon** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Daimon bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Corollary discharge signals during production are domain general: An intracerebral EEG case study with aprofessional musician.** — Cortex; ajournal devoted to the study of the nervous system and behavior (2025). PMID: 40147418. DOI: 10.1016/j.cortex.2025.02.013. Score: 37. As measured by event-related potentials, self-produced sounds elicit an overall reduced response in the auditory cortex compared to identical externally presented stimuli. This study examines this modulatory effect with high-precision recordings in naturalistic settings and explores whether it is domain-general across speech or music.
